calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-05-2026 Off Calendar

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-06-2026 Continued To Jun-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:42am and concluding at 9:44am.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank appearing represented by June Poyourow, Esq., via zoom
Defendant James Stewart is not present.
Specialy Appearing Counsel for the Defendant Gale Jackson-McCray appeared in court.

Both counsel communicated to the court they would like a continuance to try and reach settlement.

This matter is continued to June 5, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

Counsel are encouraged to meet and confer ahead of the next court date.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2026 Continued To Mar-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant James Stewart

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: D. Carter; - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank is present represented by Roger Jackson, Esq.
Defendant James Stewart is not present.
Attorney for Defendant Kathleen Clark is present in court.

The court was informed that Ms. Clark is seeking a continuance of this matter to try to reach a settlement with Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank. The court grants Ms. Clark's request and continues this matter to March 6, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505.

On March 5, 2026 there will be a bench trial if no settlement is reached. If settlement is reached, parties may contact this department to take this matter off calendar.

Mr. Jackson was reminded to submit any courtesy copies relating to this matter including a proposed judgment ahead of the March 5, 2026 hearing date.

Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, NA Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For An Order Deeming The Truth Of The Matters Specified In Plaintiffs Request For Admission As Admitted is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Plaintiff properly served Requests for Admission and Defendant James Stewart did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's requests. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided. Plaintiffs, however, conferred.

Plaintiffs' RFAs, Set One, dated August 8, 2025, are deemed admitted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Set For Trial On Feb-02-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2025 Continued To Oct-01-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
